0.content:
# Network Security Overview

Unified view across all firewall vendors — **Palo Alto PAN-OS**, **Cisco ASA**, and **Fortinet FortiGate**. Logs are generated by dedicated Dynatrace Workflow log generators every 5 minutes.

Data sources: `palo-alto-firewall` · `cisco-asa` · `fortinet-fortigate`

1.title: Total Events
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter in(log.source, "palo-alto-firewall", "cisco-asa", "fortinet-fortigate")
| summarize total = count()

2.title: Block Rate %
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter in(log.source, "palo-alto-firewall", "cisco-asa", "fortinet-fortigate")
| fieldsAdd raw_action = if(log.source == "palo-alto-firewall", paloalto.action,
                         else: if(log.source == "cisco-asa", cisco.action,
                         else: fortinet.action))
| fieldsAdd is_blocked = NOT in(raw_action, "allow", "permit", "built", "accept", "teardown", "ssl-login-succeed", "login", "logout", "config-change")
| summarize block_rate = round(toDouble(countIf(is_blocked)) / toDouble(count()) * 100, decimals: 1)

3.title: Unique Source IPs

4.title: Active Vendors
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter in(log.source, "palo-alto-firewall", "cisco-asa", "fortinet-fortigate")
| summarize vendors = countDistinct(log.source)

5.title: Events by Vendor

6.title: Events Over Time by Vendor
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter in(log.source, "palo-alto-firewall", "cisco-asa", "fortinet-fortigate")
| fieldsAdd vendor = if(log.source == "palo-alto-firewall", "Palo Alto",
                     else: if(log.source == "cisco-asa", "Cisco ASA",
                     else: "Fortinet"))
| makeTimeseries palo_alto = countIf(vendor == "Palo Alto"),
                 cisco_asa = countIf(vendor == "Cisco ASA"),
                 fortinet = countIf(vendor == "Fortinet"),
                 interval: 5m

7.title: Blocked Traffic Over Time by Vendor

8.title: Top Blocked Sources (All Vendors)

9.title: Top Targeted Destinations (All Vendors)

10.title: Action Breakdown by Vendor

11.title: High-Risk Port Blocks (All Vendors)
